description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode and traveling west on Arlington Street had gradually slowed to a stop while 
yielding to cross traffic and preparing to turn left onto Bosworth Street in San Francisco, when it was rear ended by an SUV (Vehicle 2) 
traveling directly behind. The Zoox vehicle operator then disengaged from autonomous mode. Both involved vehicles turned right onto 
Bosworth and pulled over to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle did not sustain any damage; However, Vehicle 2's front bumper 
appears to have sustained minor damage. No injuries were reported, and the police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
